methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $60M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Nuclear Energy (found 1 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 8 same-sector peers exist in Nuclear Energy, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: Fuse Energy
private.rationale: Same sector (Nuclear Energy), same stage (Series A), post-money $200M+

data.narrative:
Renaissance Fusion is a Series A nuclear energy company founded by Francesco Volpe and Martin Kupp that has raised $60.5M to date. The broader nuclear energy sector includes 3 public comparables (OKLO, NNE, SMR) and 8 private peers (including Fuse Energy, TerraPower, X-Energy, and Kairos Power), though few directly align on stage and scale.

The peer-median method was not applicable due to insufficient same-stage or adjacent-stage comparables within the nuclear energy sector—only one same-stage peer and one adjacent-stage peer were identified, falling short of the minimum three datapoints required for reliable triangulation. Consequently, analysis relied on stage-progression methodology, which applies a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical of Series A advancement to the $60.5M total raised proxy, yielding an implied valuation of $121M.

This single-method triangulation supports a median valuation of $121M, with a range of $103M to $139M reflecting reasonable variance around the 2.0x multiplier assumption. The primary uncertainty is the absence of robust peer comparables at Renaissance Fusion's stage within nuclear energy; this limits the ability to benchmark against market multiples or validate whether a 2.0x step-up accurately reflects investor expectations for the subsector. Additional pricing data from near-term Series B or later-stage nuclear transactions would strengthen conviction in this range.
